title: Netflix’s One Piece Exec Teases Season 3’s Biggest Live-Action Debut
content: One Piece is now in the works on its third season of the live-action series with Netflix , and one of the showrunners behind it all is teasing the biggest new character we’ll get in the Alabasta arc.
author: ComicBook

title: Black Channel Manga Gets TV Anime
content: The official X/Twitter account for Shogakukan 's Coro Coro Comics magazine announced on Wednesday that Satoshi Kisaichi 's Black Channel manga is getting a television anime. The account shared a commemorative illustration: Kisaichi launched the manga in Coro Coro Comics in 2020 and the series is ongoing.
author: ANN

title: Jujutsu Kaisen Season 3 Finale Fight Was Originally Much Longer Before Changes
content: It turns out the final fight in Jujutsu Kaisen ‘s third season was originally planned to be much longer before it was changed according to one of the stars behind it all. Jujutsu Kaisen Season 3 had some massive episodes on offer thanks to the first phase of the Culling Game tournament, and the final episode of the…
author: ComicBook

title: Classroom of the Elite Season 4 Anime's English Dub Streams 1st 4 Episodes on April 15
content: The English cast, which features returning members, includes: • Justin Briner as Ayanokoji • Felecia Angelle as Suzune • Tia Ballard as Amasawa • Jennifer Alyx as Chabashira • Alex Moore as Hasebe • Austin Tindle as Hashimoto • Dallas Reid as Hirata • Veronica Laux as Hiyori • Bradley Gareth as Hosen • Jamie Marchi as…
author: ANN

title: Demon Slayer Fans Are Depressed That Infinity Castle is Nowhere to be Found
content: Demon Slayer: Infinity Castle has become the biggest anime movie of all time, and for good reason. Tanjiro and the Hashira have unleashed the first entry in their finale trilogy, seeing the stars fight against some of Muzan’s most terrifying lieutenants.
author: ComicBook

title: Spring 2026’s Best New Anime Just Proved It’s a Masterpiece Worthy of Anime of the Year
content: As the Spring 2026 season settles in, newly released anime continue to roll out fresh episodes, building their narratives and drawing in fans. While some series act as successors to classics, such as Fullmetal Alchemist ’s spiritual successor, Daemons of the Shadow Realm , captivating audiences, Shonen Jump’s latest…
author: ComicBook

title: New Nostalgia-Fueled Streaming Service Announced
content: Nostalgia has been a big part of the entertainment world for longer than fans can remember, with countless franchises making comebacks and/or releasing brand new series to retread old ground. Keeping this in mind, it should come as no surprise that some streaming services have been capitalizing on this fact.
author: ComicBook

title: Bleach Confirms First Story Details for Anime’s Final Season
content: Bleach: Thousand-Year Blood War is gearing up for its grand finale later this Summer, and the anime has confirmed the first details about what to expect from its final season. Bleach: Thousand-Year Blood War made its debut a few years ago, and fans have been able to enjoy three full seasons of the new anime adapting…
author: ComicBook

title: Mahjong Pros Announces New Distribution Partnership for Manga
content: Mahjong set company Mahjong Pros ' Mahjong Pros Publishing imprint announced on Monday that it is entering a distribution partnership with Pathway Book Service for book fulfillment, warehousing, and retail distribution for its catalogue. It is also partnering with Gazelle Book Services Ltd.
author: ANN

title: JoJo’s Bizarre Adventure: Steel Ball Run Drops New Spin-Off Details
content: The Steel Ball Run recently made headlines for quite a few reasons earlier this year, as the latest season of JoJo’s Bizarre Adventure has spun the heads of anime fans worldwide.
author: ComicBook
